rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into the target implementation scope if bindings require subcomponent or implementation-level references.
Preserve AADL structure by using only component-type-visible features in type-level annexes and implementation-bound variables in implementation annexes.
generic_rules: Component type annexes must reference only ports and data types visible at the type level; implementation annexes may reference subcomponents and connections.
AGREE contracts must not introduce new package references, data types, or identifiers not present in the source AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax for all AGREE blocks.
AGREE scalar types are exclusively `int`, `real`, and `bool`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) or event ports as numeric or Boolean values in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
